▣

Sociology Student Roadmap

As a Sociology student, these are the skills that can help you stand out beyond the classroom. Follow this roadmap from Level 100 through Level 400.

Recommended Skills

Skills That Make You Competitive

▣

Technical Skills

Qualitative Research Survey Design Nvivo Spss
▤

Career Skills

Community Development Monitoring & Evaluation Social Data Analysis
▦

Industry Knowledge

Report Writing Project Management Field Research Ethics
Opportunities

Where These Skills Can Take You

01

Sociology Internships

Start exploring sociology internships to build real-world experience early.

02

Research Assistant Roles

Start exploring research assistant roles to build real-world experience early.

03

NGO & Community Projects

Start exploring ngo & community projects to build real-world experience early.

04

Industry Pathways

Start exploring industry pathways to build real-world experience early.

Learning Roadmap

Your Path From Level 100 to Level 400

Follow this structured roadmap to build your skills progressively and stay ahead of your peers.

⚐

Level 100

Build Your Foundation

1Learn QUALITATIVE RESEARCH2Improve Communication3Join Communities
♕

Level 200

Develop Core Skills

1Practice SURVEY DESIGN2Build LinkedIn3Start Small Projects
♤

Level 300

Gain Experience

1Apply NVIVO2Get Internship3Build Portfolio
♠

Level 400

Launch Your Career

1Network Professionally2Apply for Opportunities3Prepare CV & Career Path
